ddls:
CREATE TABLE "events" (
  "event_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each event */,
  "organisation_uri" TEXT /* URI for the organizing organisation */,
  "organisation_label" TEXT /* Label for the organizing organisation */,
  "service_type_uri" TEXT /* URI for the service type */,
  "service_type_label" TEXT /* Label for the service type */,
  "programme" TEXT /* Programme under which the event is organized */,
  "event_title" TEXT /* Title of the event */,
  "event_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the event */,
  "event_type" TEXT /* Type of the event (e.g., Regular, Special) */,
  "site_name" TEXT /* Name of the site where the event is held */,
  "month" TEXT /* Month when the event occurs */,
  "date_and_time" TEXT /* Specific date and time of the event */,
  "audience_type" TEXT /* Target audience or type of the event */,
  "ticket_price" TEXT /* Price of the ticket for the event */,
  "booking_information" TEXT /* Information needed for booking the event */,
  "event_status" TEXT /* Status of the event (e.g., Planned, Confirmed, Cancelled) */,
  "event_capacity" INTEGER /* Maximum number of attendees */,
  "registration_required" INTEGER /* Indicates if registration is required */,
  "registration_link" TEXT /* Link for online registration */,
  "promotional_materials" TEXT /* Links to promotional materials (e.g., flyers, posters) */,
  "event_website" TEXT /* Link to the event's dedicated website */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the event was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update for the event */,
  "version" INTEGER /* Version of the event information */,
  "feedback_link" TEXT /* Link for event feedback */,
  "sponsors" TEXT /* List of sponsors of the event */,
  "social_media_links" TEXT /* Links to social media posts or pages related to the event */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("event_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_events_organisation_uri FOREIGN KEY ("organisation_uri") REFERENCES organisations ("organisation_uri"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_events_service_type_uri FOREIGN KEY ("service_type_uri") REFERENCES service_types ("service_type_uri"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_events_site_name FOREIGN KEY ("site_name") REFERENCES sites ("site_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_events_event_type FOREIGN KEY ("event_type") REFERENCES event_types ("event_type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_events_audience_type FOREIGN KEY ("audience_type") REFERENCES audiences ("audience_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_events_programme FOREIGN KEY ("programme") REFERENCES programmes ("programme_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "organisations" (
  "organisation_uri" TEXT /* URI for the organisation */,
  "organisation_label" TEXT /* Label for the organisation */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for the organisation */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Contact phone number for the organisation */,
  "website" TEXT /* Link to the organisation's website */,
  "address" TEXT /* Physical address of the organisation */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the organisation record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update for the organisation record */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("organisation_uri")
)

CREATE TABLE "service_types" (
  "service_type_uri" TEXT /* URI for the service type */,
  "service_type_label" TEXT /* Label for the service type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the service type */,
  "icon" TEXT /* URL to an icon representing the service type */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the service type record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update for the service type record */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("service_type_uri")
)

CREATE TABLE "programmes" (
  "programme_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each programme */,
  "programme_name" TEXT /* Name of the programme */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the programme */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the programme */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the programme */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the programme record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update for the programme record */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("programme_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "event_types" (
  "event_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each event type */,
  "event_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the event type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the event type */,
  "icon" TEXT /* URL to an icon representing the event type */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the event type record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update for the event type record */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("event_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sites" (
  "site_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each site */,
  "site_name" TEXT /* Name of the site */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the site */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for inquiries about the site */,
  "latitude" TEXT /* Latitude of the site */,
  "longitude" TEXT /* Longitude of the site */,
  "capacity" INTEGER /* Maximum capacity of the site */,
  "amenities" TEXT /* Amenities available at the site */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the site record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update for the site record */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("site_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "audiences" (
  "audience_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each target audience */,
  "audience_type" TEXT /* Type of the audience */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the audience */,
  "age_range" TEXT /* Age range of the audience */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the audience record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update for the audience record */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("audience_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "booking_info" (
  "booking_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each booking information entry */,
  "event_id" INTEGER /* ID of the event */,
  "booking_details" TEXT /* Details needed for booking the event */,
  "ticket_price" TEXT /* Price of the ticket for the event */,
  "booking_url" TEXT /* Link for online booking */,
  "booking_contact" TEXT /* Contact information for booking inquiries */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the booking information was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update for the booking information */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("booking_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_booking_info_event_id FOREIGN KEY ("event_id") REFERENCES events ("event_id")
)
